name: missoula-pilot-source-registry
description: Missoula Pilot region source overrides. Pass as --source-config when re-running Missoula prep to acquire parcel, address-point, and Microsoft building-footprint layers.

parcel_polygons.notes: Montana State Library MSDI Cadastral FeatureServer. Raises parcel-source confidence from 0.28 (nearest-parcel fallback) to 0.92 and enables property-boundary-aware footprint matching. Override WF_DEFAULT_PARCEL_POLYGONS_ENDPOINT if the MSL endpoint changes or a county-level source is preferred.

parcel_address_points.notes: Montana State Library MSDI address points (E911-derived). Snaps geocoded results from road-centerline to parcel-centroid precision, improving adjacent-property differentiation. Override WF_DEFAULT_PARCEL_ADDRESS_POINTS_ENDPOINT if a county-level E911 source is available.

building_footprints_microsoft.notes: Microsoft US Building Footprints supplemental coverage (confidence weight 0.80). The MicrosoftBuildingFootprintAdapter auto-discovers tile URLs from the public catalog index when WF_MS_BUILDINGS_INDEX_URL is set (default now hardwired in adapters.py). No explicit source_endpoint needed here; the adapter populates discovered assets at prep time.
